function.name: GetProductByName
function.description: Retrieve product information by product name.

product_name.description: The name of the product to look up. Names can be multipe words

function.name: GetProductById
function.description: Retrieve product information by product ID.

product_id.description: The unique ID of the product. an ID is usually a number or number and character string.

function.name: GetInvoice
function.description: Fetch invoice details for a customer order by using the invoice number.

invoice_number.description: The number associated with the invoice.

function.name: GetInvoicesByCustomer
function.description: Retrieve all invoices associated with a customer ID.

customer_id.description: The ID of the customer whose invoices should be fetched.

function.name: GetCustomerPO
function.description: Retrieves the Purchase Order (PO) for a customer based on the PO number they provided. This is usually a request with send me my order, the PO number is...

po_number.description: The Purchase Order (PO) number that should be fetched.

function.name: GetCustomerOrder
function.description: Retrieves the Customer Order (CO) for a customer based on the Customer Order number they provided. This is usually a request with send me my order, the CO number is...

co_number.description: The Customer Order (CO) number that should be fetched.

function.name: GetCustomerOrderByEmail
function.description: Retrieves a list of Customer Orders (CO) for a customer where an email doesnt have a specific customer order number or po number. This is usually a request with I have a question about my recent order, or my orders

email.description: The from email address of the requestor
